card.name: Excessive Violence

abilities.name: Bloody Promotion
abilities.text: After this model kills an enemy model, it may gain a Promoted token.

abilities.name: Loot Their Corpse
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it may remove a Remains marker within 3" of itself. If it does so, it may either heal 2 or gain a Bolstered token.

keyword_actions.granted_to: Friendly unique Guard models and friendly Guard models with a Promoted token

actions.name: Crack Skulls
actions.effects: This model gains an Injured token and may declare this action again, increasing the Dmg by +2.

extraction_notes: Crack Skulls is a trigger on /// actions that modifies an existing attack action rather than being a standalone action with full stat line
The text describes it as a trigger gained on /// actions, but the exact mechanics are somewhat ambiguous in presentation
